## Problem statement

What user/developer problem are we solving?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest viable change.

## Alternatives considered

What other options were considered and why rejected.

- [ ] Criterion 1

## Risks and dependencies

List rollout, compatibility, or security concerns.
